subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested Himself unto all who are in the world and caused it to speak forth that which is inscribed in a guarded Tablet. Verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر نفسه لمن فی العالم و انطقه بما هو المسطور فی لوح حفیظ انه
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
